places.name: Dubai Miracle Garden
places.description: Billed as the "largest natural flower garden in the world" this Middle Eastern show field has little competition at 45 million flowers.

places.name: The World Islands
places.description: This artificial archipelago was supposed to resemble a map of the world.

places.name: Elephant Clock
places.description: A faithful reproduction of Al-Jazari's enormous water clock.

places.name: Ski Dubai
places.description: This indoor ski resort has a mountain contained inside a mall.

places.name: Dubai Gold Souk
places.description: On any given day this sprawling market houses literally tons of government-regulated gold, gems, and precious metals.

places.name: Burj Al Arab
places.description: A preposterously luxurious hotel with gold-plated iPads, Rolls Royce chauffeurs, and a staff that trains by watching "Downton Abbey."

places.name: Museum of the Future
places.description: This futuristic building is yet another architectural wonder in Dubai.
